texts.full_text: station opened with the line, and was a signal box and block post, using the telegraph instruments by 1879, with Winters instruments provided by 1890. A six lever frame was provided in 1927, for control of signals, until closed as a block post in 1993. The station was renamed Riddell in 1904, as part of a policy to adopt short station names, but was renamed to the fu

texts.full_text: KIRKLAND LAKE, my name is Angelo Francis Berlingeri. I was born on June 4 at the Peterborough Hospital. I weighed in at 9 lbs., 11 ounces. My parents, Jonathan and Valentina are enjoying their new lifestyle. They promised to take me touring. First to Lindsay to meet Opa andOma, then off to see my aunts and uncles who live just outside

texts.full_text: ich data should be requested url: '@Url.Action("GetCompLine")', cellEdit: true, cellurl: '@Url.Action("UpdateCompProperty")', //type of data Thanks in advance! A: You can use afterSaveCell or afterSubmitCell to trigger grid reloading after successful cell saving. I think the code like the following should work: afterSaveCell: function () { $(this).trigger('reloadGrid'); } If you are using latest version of free-jqGrid (4.15.5 or higher), you also need to set reloadingDuringEditing: 'save' at
